title: TD1 forms for 2025 for pay received on January 1, 2025 or later - Canada.ca
content:
## TD1 forms for 2025 for pay received on January 1, 2025 or later
- TD1 2025 Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1-WS 2025 Worksheet for the Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1AB 2025 Alberta Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1AB-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Alberta Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1BC 2025 British Columbia Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1BC-WS Worksheet for the 2025 British Columbia Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1MB 2025 Manitoba Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1MB-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Manitoba Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NB 2025 New Brunswick Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NB-WS Worksheet for the 2025 New Brunswick Personal Tax Credits Return

## Newfoundland and Labrador
- TD1NL 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NL-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Newfoundland and Labrador Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NS 2025 Nova Scotia Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NS-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Nova Scotia Personal Tax Credits Return

## Northwest Territories
- TD1NT 2025 Northwest Territories Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NT-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Northwest Territories Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NU 2025 Nunavut Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1NU-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Nunavut Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1ON 2025 Ontario Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1ON-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Ontario Personal Tax Credits Return

## Prince Edward Island
- TD1PE 2025 Prince Edward Island Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1PE-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Prince Edward Island Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1SK 2025 Saskatchewan Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1SK-WS Worksheet for the 2025 Saskatchewan Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1YT 2025 Yukon Personal Tax Credits Return
- TD1YT-WS Worksheet For The 2025 Yukon Personal Tax Credits Return
